category_sources: source_facts.description says Neo4j is a transactional property graph database; official GitHub README describes Neo4j as a graph database with ACID transactions.
display_name_sources: Official Neo4j website and GitHub README use the product name Neo4j; source_facts.name is neo4j.
docs_sources: Official Neo4j documentation page lists manuals and guides; official docs archive states current version documentation is available under neo4j.com/docs paths.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository neo4j/neo4j describes Neo4j as Graphs for Everyone and links to neo4j.com; source_facts.repo was empty, so this official source repository was selected.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions ACID transactional property graph database; official GitHub README and topics mention database, graph, NoSQL, graph-database, Cypher, Java, and Scala.
